mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail, latitude, longitude, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{isDefault})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
